title: Remediation Plan
description: A governed, auditable remediation plan produced by the AW1 Remediation Mapping Engine from a validated failure cluster. Proposes candidate fixes without applying them.

remediation_id.description: Unique identifier for this remediation plan.

cluster_signature.description: Primary error code string that identifies the source cluster.

taxonomy_version.description: Version of the error taxonomy catalog used when mapping.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this remediation plan was created.

mapping_status.description: Outcome of the mapping run. 'mapped' = a clear remediation target was found; 'ambiguous' = signal is mixed; 'rejected' = cluster failed validation gate.

mapping_reasons.description: Auditable reasons explaining every mapping decision.

dominant_error_codes.description: Error codes that dominated the mapping signal for this cluster.

remediation_targets.description: Canonical target components identified for remediation.

proposed_actions.description: Candidate remediation actions (max 2). Not applied automatically.

primary_proposal_index.description: Index into proposed_actions identifying the top-ranked proposal.

evidence_summary.description: Aggregate evidence metrics supporting the mapping decision.

action_id.description: Unique identifier for this proposed action.

target_component.description: Canonical name of the component targeted for change.

rationale.description: Explicit, auditable rationale for why this action is proposed.

expected_benefit.description: Expected benefit if this action is applied.

risk_level.description: Risk level associated with applying this change.

confidence_score.description: Deterministic confidence score (0–1) for this proposed action.

record_count.description: Number of classification records in the source cluster.

avg_cluster_confidence.description: Average classification confidence across records in the cluster.

weighted_severity_score.description: Weighted severity score from the source cluster metrics.

pass_types.description: Distinct pass types present in the source cluster.
